name: Roblox Profile
description: Shows a Roblox profile with avatar image and public account details.
author: Akashsuu

defaults.descriptionTemplate:
**User ID**
`{roblox_id}`

**Profile**
Username: `{roblox_name}`
Display Name: `{display_name}`
Created: `{created_at}`
Verified: `{verified}`
Banned: `{banned}`

**Social**
Friends: `{friends}`
Following: `{following}`
Followers: `{followers}`

**About**
{description}

**Links**
Profile: {profile_link}
